name: Watkins Five-Flavor Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter, shortening, and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and beat until smooth.
3. In another bowl, combine flour and Baking Powder; mix well and set aside.
4. Combine milk with Extracts and Flavors in a separate bowl.
5. Add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture alternately with the milk mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into a 10-inch tube pan (angel food cake pan).
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours or until the cake is done.
8. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
9. Turn the cake out of the pan onto a wire rack and invert it again.
10. Place waxed paper under the rack to catch glaze drippings.
11. Slowly spoon glaze over the top of the hot cake, allowing it to drizzle down the sides of the cake.
12. Let cool completely.
13. Glaze with Watkins Six-Flavor Glaze.
